title: Bad Request
description: The request was malformed — e.g. an invalid query filter or unsupported language code.
resolution: Verify the path segment language code and any query filters against the documented endpoints.

title: Not Found
description: No card, set, or series matches the supplied id.
resolution: Confirm the id format (`{set}-{localId}` for cards, e.g. `base1-4`). List the parent collection to discover valid ids.

title: Service Unavailable
description: The API is temporarily unavailable or under maintenance.
resolution: Retry after a short delay with exponential backoff.
